description: preflight check that config backend is valid, skills dir exists, screenpipe is reachable, and the LLM backend is ready
rules: read-only — only GET health/models probes against loopback endpoints; no writes outside record_store
checks four lines: config (backend in {local,claude,foundry}), skills_dir (exists), screenpipe (/health 200), llm (LM Studio /models or API key present)
the captured report is the artifact; offline the network probes report error but the report is still written
report written to record_store as doctor.txt
usage: Set CONFIG (config.yaml) and SKILLS_DIR (the skills/ dir). Output: doctor.txt.
limitation: An all-passing report needs the screenpipe daemon and the configured LLM backend actually reachable; offline the screenpipe and llm lines read error.
